title: Morris, Indra - Director General, Families Group, Department for Education - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Morris left her role at the Department for Education in June 2023.  Senior Advisor, Newton Europe Limited  Ms Morris sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Newton Europe Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up in February 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
